title: Meeting at the Café
content: Sarah arrived at the café ten minutes early. She checked the menu, looked around, and waited. Soon, Ethan walked through the door with a friendly smile. They had met online a few weeks before and decided to meet in person. At first, both felt a little nervous. After ordering tea and cake, the conversation became easy. They shared funny stories about their families, favorite places, and future plans. Time passed quickly, and neither wanted to leave. Before saying goodbye, they agreed to meet again the following weekend.
